raw_consumer_statement:
Please refer to my original complaint XXXX. This is the first time I have ever contact CFPB. It is also the first time a credit card has refused to credit a fraudulent charge. A friend suggested that I contact you because you help victims like myself from these unscrupulous credit card companies. I checked on my status this today and lo and behold you simply closed the case! You have got to be kidding. Is 5hat all you do, ask citi if they will fix it, they say no, you say ok closed. I dont understand. I thought you worked on fixing these atrocious actions by predatory companies. I have stopped making payments thinking you could help me fix this. You really cant/wont do anything? Please help me with this. 

Thank you. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX
